SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFFS ARTHUR O. GILMORE AND JENNIFER CHANG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAURI PAUL AND ARTHUR STEFANI, REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE DAVIS PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
